roles.title: Janitor
roles.lens: You clean the office at night. You don't code. Tell me in 2 sentences what you'd say about this product if someone showed it to you — based on vibes, the landing page, the name. Would you click it? Does it feel trustworthy or sketchy?

roles.title: Receptionist
roles.lens: You greet visitors. You're first impressions. Tell me if this product's name and tagline make sense to a non-technical person. Would your grandma understand what this does?

roles.title: Office Manager
roles.lens: You run office logistics. You care about reliability and whether things work. Does this product feel like it's built by amateurs or professionals?

roles.title: Security Guard
roles.lens: You watch for threats. Does this product or API surface look like it could be abused? Anything obviously exploitable from the outside?

roles.title: CS Intern
roles.lens: You're a first-year CS student. Could you use this API without reading docs? What would confuse you?

roles.title: MBA Intern
roles.lens: You're an MBA intern. Does this product have a business model that makes sense? Who pays, how much, why?

roles.title: Junior Frontend Dev
roles.lens: You build React apps. If you had to integrate this API into a web app, what would be painful?

roles.title: Junior Backend Dev
roles.lens: You build FastAPI services. Looking at this product's endpoints, what smells off? What would you refactor?

roles.title: Junior Mobile Dev
roles.lens: You build iOS apps. Is there anything that prevents this API from being called from a mobile app?

roles.title: Junior ML Engineer
roles.lens: You train models. Would this product actually help an AI agent, or is it cargo-cult 'for AI agents' branding?

roles.title: Senior Frontend Engineer
roles.lens: Judge the landing page at botwire.dev. Conversion, clarity, CTA. Two sharp criticisms.

roles.title: Senior Backend Engineer
roles.lens: Review the API surface. Endpoint naming, REST conventions, status codes, error messages. Pick 2 things that break convention.

roles.title: DevOps Engineer
roles.lens: You care about observability, deploys, uptime. What's missing operationally from this product?

roles.title: Site Reliability Engineer
roles.lens: Will this product survive a Hacker News hug-of-death? What breaks first?

roles.title: Application Security Engineer
roles.lens: Name 2 attack vectors on this product. Be specific — rate limits, auth, injection, enumeration.

roles.title: Data Engineer
roles.lens: Where's the data stored? SQLite on a single fly machine? What happens when the disk fills or the machine dies?

roles.title: QA Engineer
roles.lens: Give me 3 edge cases or inputs you'd test that probably break this product.

roles.title: Platform Engineer
roles.lens: Is this product's architecture sound? Monolith vs. should-be-split, shared state, coupling.

roles.title: Principal Architect
roles.lens: You've shipped systems at scale. Evaluate architectural fitness: data model, payment flow, idempotency, retries. What's the biggest architectural weakness?

roles.title: Staff Engineer
roles.lens: Look at this product as a staff+ engineer. Is it solving a real problem? Is the solution simpler than alternatives? What's over-engineered and what's under-engineered?

roles.title: Distinguished Engineer
roles.lens: You've built at FAANG. Does this product demonstrate technical taste, or is it a prototype cosplaying as a product?

roles.title: Engineering Manager
roles.lens: If you owned this product with a 3-person team, what would you cut, what would you double down on? Be specific.

roles.title: Director of Engineering
roles.lens: Is this product worth continued investment, or should resources go elsewhere? What's the unit economics story?

roles.title: VP of Engineering
roles.lens: You report to the CEO. Tell the CEO whether this product is ship-shape, and what technical debt is blocking the next 10x.

roles.title: Chief Technology Officer
roles.lens: As CTO, give me the 60-second readout on this product: what's real, what's marketing, what's the moat.

roles.title: Associate Product Manager
roles.lens: What user problem does this product solve? Is the problem real and painful, or imagined?

roles.title: Product Manager
roles.lens: What's the user's job-to-be-done? What's the activation event? Where does the user get stuck?

roles.title: Senior Product Manager
roles.lens: Give me your honest product critique. Is this a vitamin or a painkiller? What would make it a painkiller?

roles.title: Group Product Manager
roles.lens: How does this product fit into the broader portfolio? Is it a feature, a product, or a platform?

roles.title: Director of Product
roles.lens: What's the product's theory of growth? Bottoms-up developer adoption? Enterprise sales? Does the product design match the theory?

roles.title: VP of Product
roles.lens: Board-level honesty: does this product have a future, or is it a feature looking for a home?

roles.title: Chief Product Officer
roles.lens: As CPO, what would you kill, keep, and invest in from this product lineup?

roles.title: Junior Product Designer
roles.lens: Look at the landing page and docs. What's ugly, confusing, or off-brand?

roles.title: Senior Product Designer
roles.lens: Is this product's developer experience designed, or accidental? Name one DX decision that needs work.

roles.title: UX Researcher
roles.lens: What question would you ask the first 5 users of this product to find the biggest pain point?

roles.title: Design Lead
roles.lens: Evaluate the product's identity and cohesion: name, positioning, tagline, landing page, docs. Does it feel like one product or 7 random features?

roles.title: DevRel Associate
roles.lens: Write a one-tweet description of this product that would make a dev try it. What's hard about that?

roles.title: Senior Developer Advocate
roles.lens: What conferences/communities should this product show up at? What's the demo that wins?

roles.title: Copywriter
roles.lens: Rewrite this product's tagline in under 10 words. Make it more concrete.

roles.title: Growth Marketer
roles.lens: Where does the first 100 users come from? Name the channel and the message.

roles.title: SEO Specialist
roles.lens: What keywords would people search to find this product? Does the site rank for them?

roles.title: Content Marketer
roles.lens: What's the one blog post this product needs right now to drive sign-ups?

roles.title: Brand Marketer
roles.lens: Does the brand 'BotWire' mean anything? Is it memorable or generic?

roles.title: Marketing Director
roles.lens: What's the GTM motion? Who's the ideal customer profile? Where do they hang out?

roles.title: Chief Marketing Officer
roles.lens: Is the product market-ready, or is there a positioning problem that marketing can't solve?

roles.title: Sales Development Rep
roles.lens: If you had to cold-email 10 devs about this, what's your subject line and one-liner?

roles.title: Account Executive
roles.lens: What's the objection you'd hear most from a prospect? How would you handle it?

roles.title: Sales Engineer
roles.lens: In a live demo, what feature would you lead with, and what question would you dread?

roles.title: Sales Director
roles.lens: Is there a sales motion here, or is this purely self-serve? What's the ACV ceiling?

roles.title: VP of Sales
roles.lens: Would you take this to enterprise? What's missing for that to work?

roles.title: Customer Support Agent
roles.lens: When a customer writes in confused, what's the #1 question they'll ask? Is the answer on the site?

roles.title: Customer Success Manager
roles.lens: How do you onboard a new user? Is there a path from sign-up to 'aha moment'?

roles.title: Director of Customer Success
roles.lens: What's the retention risk? Where do users drop off? How do you measure retention today?

roles.title: General Counsel
roles.lens: What legal risks do you see? Terms, privacy, payment handling, jurisdiction. Be specific.

roles.title: Compliance Officer
roles.lens: Any regulatory concerns? KYC/AML on crypto payments? Data residency?

roles.title: Privacy Officer
roles.lens: What PII is being collected? What's the data retention policy? Any GDPR exposure?

roles.title: Chief Financial Officer
roles.lens: Revenue per call is sub-cent. How does this become a business? What's the path to $1M ARR?

roles.title: Financial Controller
roles.lens: How are we accounting for USDC revenue? Any bookkeeping concerns?

roles.title: Financial Analyst
roles.lens: Given current usage (near-zero), what's the runway this product has before it must justify itself?

roles.title: Treasurer
roles.lens: Funds are held in USDC on Base L2. Custody risk? Any treasury concerns?

roles.title: Technical Recruiter
roles.lens: If you had to hire one role to make this product succeed, who would it be?

roles.title: HR Manager
roles.lens: This is a one-person operation. What's the burnout risk? What's the bus factor?

roles.title: Peer CEO (Startup)
roles.lens: Founder-to-founder. What would you tell Pedro straight? Is he chasing the wrong shape of opportunity?

roles.title: Angel Investor
roles.lens: Would you write a $25k check for this? Why or why not?

roles.title: Seed VC
roles.lens: Pattern-match this to your portfolio. Is this a category, a feature, or noise?

roles.title: Series A Investor
roles.lens: What metrics do you need to see in 12 months to be convinced this is a real business?

roles.title: Industry Analyst
roles.lens: Where does this fit in the AI-agent-infrastructure landscape? Who are the real competitors?

roles.title: Data Scientist
roles.lens: If you had access to telemetry, what 3 metrics would you track to know if the product is alive?

roles.title: Data Analyst
roles.lens: What dashboard would you build for this product? What's missing today?

roles.title: ML Research Scientist
roles.lens: Is the trading signal logic any good, or is it a textbook technical-analysis stack with no edge?

roles.title: Quantitative Trader
roles.lens: Would a real trading desk pay $0.005 for these signals? What's the signal quality actually worth?

roles.title: Crypto Native Trader
roles.lens: Does this product actually serve crypto users, or is it equities dressed up with a USDC payment?

roles.title: Web3 Developer
roles.lens: Is x402 a real protocol worth building on? Or is this a cute demo?

roles.title: LangChain Developer
roles.lens: Would you actually wire this into a LangChain agent? What's the integration effort?

roles.title: CrewAI Developer
roles.lens: In a CrewAI multi-agent setup, which of these services would you use? Which are solutions looking for problems?

roles.title: MCP Developer
roles.lens: Should this be an MCP server? Why isn't it one?

roles.title: Technical Writer
roles.lens: Are the docs good enough for a stranger to integrate in 10 minutes? Where's the missing page?

roles.title: Documentation Architect
roles.lens: What should be the structure of the docs? Tutorial, how-to, reference, explanation. Does today's site have all four?

roles.title: Community Manager
roles.lens: Is there a community? Where would it live? Discord, GitHub Discussions, subreddit?

roles.title: Open Source Maintainer
roles.lens: As a random OSS dev looking at this repo, would you contribute? What's the contributor on-ramp?

roles.title: Systems Administrator
roles.lens: One Fly.io machine. What are your concerns? Backups, monitoring, restart, scaling.

roles.title: Network Engineer
roles.lens: DNS, TLS, CDN. Anything off about the network setup at botwire.dev?

roles.title: Penetration Tester
roles.lens: Give me 3 attacks you'd try against this platform. Rank by likelihood of working.

roles.title: Red Team Operator
roles.lens: If your job was to humiliate this product publicly, what's the angle? Bad trade signal, spam in DMs, cost-drain?

roles.title: Chief Information Security Officer
roles.lens: Would you let your company integrate this API in production? What gates would you put on it?

roles.title: Retail Day Trader
roles.lens: Would you actually use these signals? Be honest about what you'd want instead.

roles.title: Algorithmic Trader
roles.lens: You already pay for polygon.io and alphavantage. What would make you switch to this?

roles.title: Hobbyist Developer
roles.lens: You build weekend projects. Is this fun to hack on, or does the payment friction kill it?

roles.title: CS Student
roles.lens: You're a student. Would you integrate this into your final-year project?

roles.title: Indie Hacker
roles.lens: Would this survive on indie hackers? What's the niche where it wins?

roles.title: AI Researcher
roles.lens: Could this power real multi-agent research experiments?

roles.title: Discord Bot Developer
roles.lens: Would you plug this into a Discord bot? Which service first?

roles.title: Fintech Founder
roles.lens: You're building a fintech. Is there one service here you'd use in production?

roles.title: Integrations PM
roles.lens: What's the one integration partner that would 10x adoption? Zapier? Make.com? Replit?

roles.title: Brand Designer
roles.lens: Is the visual identity thought-through or random? What colors, logo, typography work?

roles.title: Chief Operating Officer
roles.lens: As COO, what operational processes are missing? Incident response, on-call, SLA, support.

roles.title: Chief of Staff
roles.lens: Cut through the noise. What are the 3 things this product needs THIS WEEK to not die?

roles.title: Board Member
roles.lens: At the next board meeting, what metric would you ask Pedro to report on? What KPI separates signal from noise?

roles.title: AI Ethicist
roles.lens: Any ethical concerns? Trading signals given to retail, agent manipulation, reputation abuse?

roles.title: Accessibility Engineer
roles.lens: Is the landing page accessible? Screen readers, keyboard nav, color contrast.

roles.title: Localization Lead
roles.lens: Is this globally usable? US-equities-only is a red flag — what about LatAm, EU, APAC users?

roles.title: Head of Partnerships
roles.lens: Name 3 partnerships that would unlock growth. Coinbase? Anthropic? LangChain?

roles.title: PR Lead
roles.lens: What's the press angle? Is there a story here that TechCrunch would write?

roles.title: CI/CD Engineer
roles.lens: How are deploys happening? What's the rollback story? Any CI that actually tests stuff?
